name: Intern Bird
descr: When fired, you can return this bird to your hand

name: Night Shift Bird
descr: When hired, draw 1 card and fire this bird.

name: Desperate Bird
descr: This bird can be treated as lvl 1

name: Reception Bird
descr: When hired, you can hire another penguin that is level 1

name: Dismissal
descr: Fire any lvl 1 penguin on the field

name: Lunch break
descr: Cancel an effect

name: Coffee pot refill
descr: Draw 2 cards

name: Cubicle
descr: Every adjacent penguin earns 1 extra $

name: Number 2 pencil
descr: Earn $1 for every penguin in your zone

name: Undo
descr: Remove a card in your zone

name: Bandit Bird
descr: Main: you can steal $1 from an opponent

name: Sabotage Bird
descr: Before the main phase, place one token on this bird. Main: You can remove all tokens from this bird to fire another opponents bird that has the same level or below the number of tokens removed, and gain money equal to the level of that bird.

name: Switchblade
descr: When an opponent hires a bird, earn money equal to it's level and flip it face-down

name: Failed robbery
descr: Fire all birds in your zone with a level less than 0

name: Access Bird
descr: once per turn: you can move this card

name: Startup Bird
descr: if placed adjacent to another penguin, gain 2 pts when hired

name: Eureka Bird
descr: once per turn: you may pay 1 pt to add one item from your trash to your hand
column6: sub_type engineer. Based on Archimedes, a very early inventor/engineer

name: Fishbook Pro
descr: once per turn: you can consult a penguin to a space adjacent to this card

name: Search Engine
descr: add 1 penguin from your deck to your hand

name: Spicy Dish
descr: destroy a restaurant and fire any adjacent penguins

name: Sweet Dish
descr: choose 1 restaurant. the controllers of adjacent penguins earn 1 pt for each penguin.

name: 5 star review
descr: move a penguin on the field to a space adjacent to a Restaraunt

name: Internship
descr: reduce the cost of placing a penguin by 1

name: Career fair
descr: shuffle a penguin from trash into the deck

name: Bad fit
descr: prevent a 0pt penguin from being hired
